prompt: A breathtaking, surreal travel poster on a white canvas background, featuring a magical, glowing red silk ribbon that flows diagonally from the bottom right to the top left, seamlessly blending traditional and modern elements of a city. At the bottom right, a tiny figure of a woman in a flowing red Hanfu holds the end of the ribbon. As the ribbon winds upward, it transforms into a dynamic cityscape. The lower-middle section features multi-story wooden stilt houses glowing with warm lanterns with a modern monorail train passing through them. The center showcases a vibrant, illuminated modern metropolis with a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers connected by a skybridge, a wide river with boats, a red suspension bridge, and a cable car suspended in the air. The top fades into majestic, misty mountains, traditional pavilions, and a pale red sun. The left side of the poster features elegant typography: large, golden, textured Chinese calligraphy reading "重庆", with the English text "CHONGQING" below it. Further down, the text "SPRING 2026" is displayed in a clean, serif font, accompanied by smaller vertical Chinese text and red traditional seal stamps. The overall style is a masterful blend of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D rendering with soft, ethereal clouds and mist framing the composition.
